objective: Implement a fork-local runtime profile layer that selects conservative vLLM engine defaults by runtime/model profile while preserving explicit env override behavior and existing safety guards.
scope: Apply minimal reversible edits in src/engine_args.py, .runpod/hub.json, and aiwf.request.json to add RUNTIME_PROFILE and MODEL_PROFILE selectors, profile-based defaults for key engine args, and RunPod advanced dropdown exposure without changing upstream workflows.
acceptance_criteria: src/engine_args.py reads RUNTIME_PROFILE (safe|balanced|throughput) and MODEL_PROFILE (auto|qwen3_5_27b|general_7b|general_14b) and computes profile defaults for max_model_len, max_num_batched_tokens, max_num_seqs, gpu_memory_utilization, enforce_eager, language_model_only, and enable_chunked_prefill.
Explicit env vars for those fields retain highest precedence over computed profile defaults.
MODEL_PROFILE=auto resolves qwen3_5_27b for Qwen 3.5 models unless MODEL_PROFILE is explicitly set; runtime defaults to safe for >=14B or unknown model sizes.
Existing safety caps SAFE_MAX_MODEL_LEN_CAP and SAFE_MAX_NUM_BATCHED_TOKENS_CAP remain active for computed defaults.
Existing optional zero-to-None normalization for NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE, MAX_CPU_LORAS, and MAX_PARALLEL_LOADING_WORKERS remains unchanged.
.runpod/hub.json exposes RUNTIME_PROFILE and MODEL_PROFILE as advanced dropdown inputs with allowed options.
tests_expected: python -c "import json; json.load(open('.runpod/hub.json')); json.load(open('aiwf.request.json')); print('json ok')"
rollback_plan: Fork-local rollback is one commit that removes profile selection helpers and profile default application in src/engine_args.py, removes RUNTIME_PROFILE and MODEL_PROFILE entries from .runpod/hub.json, and restores prior behavior where defaults were driven only by existing args/env logic. No upstream interactions.
deploy_plan: Validate in this fork with py_compile, JSON parse checks, and docker buildx bake --print; then perform staged runtime rollout safe->balanced->throughput with a qwen3.5 and non-qwen smoke matrix before release tagging.
threat_model: Risks: misclassified model profile causing aggressive defaults, runtime profile misuse increasing VRAM pressure, and silent behavior shifts. Mitigations: constrained profile option set, safe default for >=14B/unknown, explicit-env precedence, retained safety caps/chunked-prefill guardrails, and immediate fork-local rollback path.
